channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Meet the teens who competed in 'World Series of birding'
item.description: These teens make up a high school birding team, "The Pete Dunnelins," who came in second place last weekend in the 2026 competition dubbed the "World ...

item.title: Long Island Rail Road workers go on strike after failing to reach new contract
item.description: The strike stems from an inability to reach a deal on a new four-year contract. The MTA and unions agreed to the terms of the first three years, but d...

item.title: New York doctor who survived Ebola says he fears for healthcare workers
item.description: A New York doctor who contracted and survived Ebola more than a decade ago says he is worried for healthcare workers who are at the center of treating...

item.title: DOJ to create 'Truth and Justice Commission' to compensate allies: Sources
item.description: The DOJ is finalizing a deal to launch a so-called "Truth and Justice Commission" to pay claims made by alleged victims of government "weaponization,"...
